subject: fix(review): address code review findings across 7 files
body:
Bug fixes:
- App.jsx: derive safeSelectedCell via useMemo so children never see
  out-of-bounds index during layout changes (was useEffect, one frame late)
- LayoutTab: add bounds guard in cellToSection for invalid cell indices
- ExportButtons: add cancelledRef to abort multi-page/PDF exports early
- SaveLoadModal: backdrop click closes modal, aria-label on close button,
  role="dialog" + aria-modal, auto-focus save input on open

Refactoring:
- Extract shiftLayoutCellData/swapLayoutCellData helpers into cellUtils.js,
  replacing 60+ lines of inline loops in useAdState.setLayout
- Add dev-only console.warn when deepEqual hits MAX_DEPTH (20 levels)

Tags: review, bugs, a11y, refactor, state
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review
Semver: patch

title: address code review findings across 7 files
